title: Behind Closed Doors
writer: H. Milner Kitchin, Lillian Ducey, Howard J. Green
actors: Virginia Valli, Gaston Glass, Otto Matieson
plot: Behind the doors of a foreign-government's embassy in Washington D. C. a group of royal loyalists are attempting to raise funds to aid a counter-revolution and restore the deposed emperor in a new republic. They are led by an unkn...
